prompt: I'm a software engineer earning £95,000. I also rent out a flat (profit about £6,200 after expenses), do some freelance consulting on the side (£11,000 gross, about £3,000 in expenses), sold some Ethereum for a £7,200 gain and did a few token swaps, and I get child benefit for 2 kids. My employer does salary sacrifice pension at 6%. I feel like I'm juggling a lot here — what's my actual tax position and am I missing anything?

assertions.text: Correctly reduces employment income by salary sacrifice (£95,000 - £5,700 = £89,300)
Applies CGT annual exempt amount to the crypto gain
Explains token swaps are separate taxable disposals
Calculates or mentions HICBC given total income level
Mentions Class 2 and/or Class 4 NI on self-employment profits
Provides a combined tax liability estimate or step-by-step breakdown
Recommends pension strategy to reduce ANI below £100k if applicable
